question: Will I be promoted to Mana Gold by 12 am May 31, 2026?
reason: Promotion requirements are stringent and time is limited.
evidence: Promotion requires a single deposit of at least $1,000 and trading 18 lots for Classic accounts or 30 lots for ECN accounts.
The promotion period runs from January 1 to December 31, 2026.
The promotion is available to clients from permitted countries.
